name: mimir
description: Codex workflow support for Mimir's local-first, librarian-governed agent memory.

interface.shortDescription: Submit governed memory drafts from Codex without bypassing the librarian.
interface.longDescription: Mimir is a local-first memory governance layer for agent sessions. This Codex plugin teaches the full workflow: check project readiness, verify explicit native setup, submit durable checkpoint drafts, inspect governed context, and preserve the librarian as the only canonical writer.
defaultPrompt: Run Mimir doctor for this repo.
Checkpoint the durable decisions from this session.
Show me current governed Mimir context.
